visa_types.name: SHORT STAY VISA
visa_types.overview:
Short Stay visa entitles an
                                                            applicant, who does not hold a residence permit, to stay in
                                                            Switzerland for an uninterrupted period or a total of
                                                            successive periods of stays that does
                                                            not exceed 90 days per 180 days prior to the control date
                                                            (border control upon entry into or departure from the
                                                            Schengen Area, or police check within the Schengen Area).In
                                                            other words, the duration
                                                            of stay must not exceed at any time 90 days per 180 – day
                                                            period. Switzerland is one of the 26 European countries
                                                            forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls
                                                            between them.
List of Schengen Countries.:

[Table:SHORT STAY VISA]
visa_types.full_text:
Short Stay visa entitles an
                                                            applicant, who does not hold a residence permit, to stay in
                                                            Switzerland for an uninterrupted period or a total of
                                                            successive periods of stays that does
                                                            not exceed 90 days per 180 days prior to the control date
                                                            (border control upon entry into or departure from the
                                                            Schengen Area, or police check within the Schengen Area).In
                                                            other words, the duration
                                                            of stay must not exceed at any time 90 days per 180 – day
                                                            period. Switzerland is one of the 26 European countries
                                                            forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls
                                                            between them.
List of Schengen Countries.:

[Table:SHORT STAY VISA]

visa_types.name: Visitor
visa_types.documents_required:
Document required for Visitor Visa please click here. 
Please note:
- To bring a copy of the bio page and
                                                                            amendment page of the current passport copy
                                                                            in addition to the passport copy mention in
                                                                            the check list.
- Two photographs (with white background;
                                                                            must be taken within the last six months)
- To arrange the documents according to the
                                                                            given order as per the check list.
If you had a previous Schengen Visa issued in the past 59 months: Under the condition that your fingerprints were taken satisfactory last time you don’t have to present, yourself personally for lodging your application. The representing person needs an authorization letter to lodge your application.
visa_types.visa_fees:
For all categories of
                                                                                visas, i.e. single, double,
                                                                            multiple entries or transit visa will be as
                                                                            per below:

[Table:  Visitor]
Please note:
- Children under 6 years are exempted to pay visa fee.
- Applicants shall be levied a service fee 370 MVR (inclusive of all taxes).
- The applicable visa fee in LKR is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa fee can be paid online through the link sent at the point of submission at the VFS center.
- Service fee can be paid in cash or transfer only.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.
- The above VFS Global service charges include taxes.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

Applicants, who wish to obtain a

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visitor visa application is
                                                                        applicable in case you are travelling to visit
                                                                        family, friends, and relatives. This visa is
                                                                        given for travel period not exceeding 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visitor visa application is
                                                                        applicable in case you are travelling to visit
                                                                        family, friends, and relatives. This visa is
                                                                        given for travel period not exceeding 90 days.

## Visa Fees
For all categories of
                                                                                visas, i.e. single, double,
                                                                            multiple entries or transit visa will be as
                                                                            per below:

[Table:  Visitor]
Please note:
- Children under 6 years are exempted to pay visa fee.
- Applicants shall be levied a service fee 370 MVR (inclusive of all taxes).
- The applicable visa fee in LKR is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa fee can be paid online through the link sent at the point of submission at the VFS center.
- Service fee can be paid in cash or transfer only.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.
- The above VFS Global service charges include taxes.

## Documents Required
 Document required for Visitor Visa please click here. 
Please note:
- To bring a copy of the bio page and
                                                                            amendment page of the current passport copy
                                                                            in addition to the passport copy mention in
                                                                            the check list.
- Two photographs (with white background;
                                                                            must be taken within the last six months)
- To arrange the documents according to the
                                                                            given order as per the check list.
If you had a previous Schengen Visa issued in the past 59 months: Under the condition that your fingerprints were taken satisfactory last time you don’t have to present, yourself personally for lodging your application. The representing person needs an authorization letter to lodge your application.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Applicants, who wish to obtain a
                                                                        visa application form to Switzerland,
                                                                        Liechtenstein, Netherlands, Poland, Slovenia,
                                                                        Luxembourg or Belgium, can download the
                                                                        requisite form here.
Download Visa Applications
                                                                            Forms
 
 Visa Application Form In English 
Questionnaire
Applications will only be accepted in the
                                                                        following languages: English, German, French or
                                                                        Italian.
To download a
                                                                            form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save
                                                                                the form on your computer. 

OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the
                                                                            required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.visa_fees:
For all categories of
                                                                                visas, i.e. single, double,
                                                                            multiple entries or transit visa will be as
                                                                            per below:

[Table:  Family Swiss Eu]
Please note:
- The below family member of EU, EEA or CH citizen are exempted to pay visa fee
- Spouse or registered partner of EU, EEA or CH Citizen
- Children who are aged below 21 Years old (of EU, EEA or CH citizen and/ or of his spouse/Partner)
- Proof of regular payments from host to his dependent adult children or dependent parents in Sri Lanka during the last 06 months must be submitted with the application for the below EU, EEA or CH citizen. If not standard visa fee should be paid and also kindly request You to apply under visitor visa category.
- Dependent adult children (of EU, EEA or CH citizen or/and of his spouse/partner)
- Dependent parents (of EU, EEA or CH citizen or/and of his spouse/partner)
- Children under 6 years are exempted to pay visa fee.
- Applicants shall be levied a service fee 370 MVR (inclusive of all taxes).
- The applicable visa fee in LKR is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa fee can be paid online through the link sent at the point of submission at the VFS center.
- Service fee can be paid in cash or transfer only.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Following family members of Swiss,
                                                                        EU or EEA citizens are subject to a simplified
                                                                        procedure
- spouse
- their descendants* who are not yet 21 years
                                                                            old
- their dependent descendants* and
                                                                            ascendants**
(*descendants must not be
                                                                        necessarily the children of the married couple;
                                                                        being children of the husband or of the wife is
                                                                        sufficient / **ascendants are the parents
                                                                        of Swiss, EU or EEA citizen or the parents of
                                                                        his/her spouse)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Following family members of Swiss,
                                                                        EU or EEA citizens are subject to a simplified
                                                                        procedure
- spouse
- their descendants* who are not yet 21 years
                                                                            old
- their dependent descendants* and
                                                                            ascendants**
(*descendants must not be
                                                                        necessarily the children of the married couple;
                                                                        being children of the husband or of the wife is
                                                                        sufficient / **ascendants are the parents
                                                                        of Swiss, EU or EEA citizen or the parents of
                                                                        his/her spouse)

## Visa Fees
For all categories of
                                                                                visas, i.e. single, double,
                                                                            multiple entries or transit visa will be as
                                                                            per below:

[Table:  Family Swiss Eu]
Please note:
- The below family member of EU, EEA or CH citizen are exempted to pay visa fee
- Spouse or registered partner of EU, EEA or CH Citizen
- Children who are aged below 21 Years old (of EU, EEA or CH citizen and/ or of his spouse/Partner)
- Proof of regular payments from host to his dependent adult children or dependent parents in Sri Lanka during the last 06 months must be submitted with the application for the below EU, EEA or CH citizen. If not standard visa fee should be paid and also kindly request You to apply under visitor visa category.
- Dependent adult children (of EU, EEA or CH citizen or/and of his spouse/partner)
- Dependent parents (of EU, EEA or CH citizen or/and of his spouse/partner)
- Children under 6 years are exempted to pay visa fee.
- Applicants shall be levied a service fee 370 MVR (inclusive of all taxes).
- The applicable visa fee in LKR is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa fee can be paid online through the link sent at the point of submission at the VFS center.
- Service fee can be paid in cash or transfer only.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.

## Documents Required
Document required for Family Swiss Eu Visa please click here. 
Please note:
- To bring a copy of the bio page and
                                                                            amendment page of the current passport copy
                                                                            in addition to the passport copy mention in
                                                                            the check list.
- Two photographs (with white background;
                                                                            must be taken within the last six months)
- To arrange the documents according to the
                                                                            given order as per the check list.
If you had a previous Schengen Visa issued in the past 59 months: Under the condition that your fingerprints were taken satisfactory last time you don’t have to present, yourself personally for lodging your application. The representing person needs an 
                                                                            authorization letter to lodge your application.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Applicants, who wish to obtain a
                                                                        visa application form to Switzerland,

- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: LONG STAY VISA FOR SWITZERLAND
visa_types.overview:
(Duration of stay more than 90 days)
Applicants for long stay (more than three months) and resident permit:
May apply directly at the Embassy of Switzerland with prior appointment from Monday to Thursday, 10am to 12 noon.
Address:
Embassy of Switzerland in Sri Lanka 
63, Srimath R.G Senanayake Mawatha,(Gregory’s Road)
Colombo 7
Sri Lanka
Tel.: +94 11 269 12 20 Monday to Thursday, 14:00 – 16:00
For appointment only
www.eda.admin.ch/Colombo (http://www.eda.admin.ch/colombo.html)
visa_types.full_text:
## (Duration of stay more than 90 days)
Applicants for long stay (more than three months) and resident permit:
May apply directly at the Embassy of Switzerland with prior appointment from Monday to Thursday, 10am to 12 noon.
Address:
Embassy of Switzerland in Sri Lanka 
63, Srimath R.G Senanayake Mawatha,(Gregory’s Road)
Colombo 7
Sri Lanka
Tel.: +94 11 269 12 20 Monday to Thursday, 14:00 – 16:00
For appointment only
www.eda.admin.ch/Colombo (http://www.eda.admin.ch/colombo.html)

visa_types.name: EU REGULATION
visa_types.overview:
(Duration of stay less than 90 days)
EU-Regulation (Visa
                                                                    codex)\
- Application can be submitted only six (6) months prior to the date of departure.
- From May 1, 2010 only passports issued within the
                                                                    previous ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3)
                                                                    months longer than the intended stay.
visa_types.full_text:
## (Duration of stay less than 90 days)
EU-Regulation (Visa
                                                                    codex)\
- Application can be submitted only six (6) months prior to the date of departure.
- From May 1, 2010 only passports issued within the
                                                                    previous ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3)
                                                                    months longer than the intended stay.

- Visa fee can be paid online through the link sent at the point of submission at the VFS center.
- Service fee can be paid in cash or transfer only.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.
- The above VFS Global service charges include taxes.

## Documents Required
Document required for Tourist Visa please click here. 
Please note:
- To bring a copy of the bio page and
                                                                            amendment page of the current passport copy
                                                                            in addition to the passport copy mention in
                                                                            the check list.
- Two photographs (with white background;
                                                                            must be taken within the last six months)
- To arrange the documents according to the
                                                                            given order as per the check list.
If you had a previous Schengen Visa issued in the past 59 months: Under the condition that your fingerprints were taken satisfactory last time you don’t have to present, yourself personally for lodging your application. The representing person needs an 
                                                                            authorization letter to lodge your application.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Applicants, who wish to obtain a
                                                                        visa application form to Switzerland,
                                                                        Liechtenstein, Netherlands, Poland, Slovenia,
                                                                        Luxembourg or Belgium, can download the
                                                                        requisite form here.

                                                                            Forms
 
 Visa Application Form In English 
Questionnaire
Applications will only be accepted in the
                                                                        following languages: English, German, French or
                                                                        Italian.
To download a
                                                                            form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save
                                                                                the form on your computer. 

OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the
                                                                            required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

                                                                        areas of the airports situated on the territory
                                                                        of Member States. Maldivian travelers

                                                                        through Member States’ airports are
                                                                        exempted from this requirement.
